_comment: G2 — the jj-not-git lesson told twice, PARAPHRASED (stmt_sim 0.202 — the measured zone where real same-lesson paraphrases live; a verbatim fixture would pass via near-dup collision and prove nothing), across 2 sessions from 2 repos. The rare-shingle channel surfaces the candidate, the residue call merges it (by:llm, audit-keyed), scope derives cross-cutting, and 2 fresh distinct sessions mature it at the single bar (design §3.1/§3.4).
